content.full_text:
October 11,1991
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacremento, Ca. 95814

     I chair a Recall Committee and am also the chairwoman
and first signee a proponent of the Recall against three
City of Rio Dell Councilmembers.
     There are five listed proponents and fourteen active
members of the Recall Committee, all of whom have been and
are working on the various Recall activities, including
delivering the "Notice of Intent", to circulating petitions
for signatures.
     We have not solicited funds or financial assistance
although an anonymous contribution of $200.00 was recieved
and partially used for items of stationary. No funds have
been nor will be used  for wages or compensation of any
nature.
     Please advise and/or provide any information or forms
that we might need in order to comply with the requirements
of The Political Reform Act (Govt. Code § 81000 et seq.).


CC = Proponents & Committee Members


                                        Valerie S. Creel
                                        Chairwoman, Rio Dell
                                        Recall Committee

[illegible] 1221.11 [illegible]

[illegible] PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS ISSUED [illegible]
OUR RELIEF [GRANTED [illegible]

BIKER [illegible] CORROBORATED

[illegible] and held at the DEFENDANT'S PLANTS PLANTS I
DURING DAMAGING/ILLEGAL and in PROMPTLY [illegible] SAMPLE DAILY ONE
[illegible]LIST OFT I [illegible]

[illegible] HOWEVER the PREJUDGING DONUT OUTS ARE RIGHT
THE HEAD EVEN MORE SO ILL JEOPARDIZED FILLED AND IS JUDGMENT
ATTRIBUTING [illegible] FILLED OFFICER - A NO KNOW -
[illegible][illegible]"[illegible] SO BRIGHT AS ALL OWN

[illegible] FOR

CONSIDERED [ILLEGIBLE] IS COURT [illegible] FOR FROM ER
AVOIDS NEW O.TRUST TO JEOPARDIZED ON [illegible] IS URGENT
LOSS ABOUT - ELIMINATED TO AMEND ITS EACH ILLEGIBLE ONE
ITS TO JEOPARDIZED SO OPER FOR SOME ED ILL FOR [illegible]

[illegible]

BRIEF TO JEOPARDIZED HAS CURRENT COMELL ENJOYS DAILY
DIMENSIONS; AND ONLY CITED OL PLANT L EACH JEANS IS USED
AGE, IS BOUTS - SOON [UGLY] FOR MILDER ILLEGIBLE OUT TO

[illegible] CONTINUED [illegible] SO

[illegible signature or mark]

[illegible]
[illegible]
[illegible] ILLOGIL ILLOGIL

B
